name: dashboard-widgets
description: Free-form per-user dashboard layout: drag, resize from any edge / corner, vertical compaction, three breakpoints (lg 24 cols / md 12 cols / sm 1 col). Storage + API + DashboardGrid wrapper around react-grid-layout. Does NOT include integration widgets (weather/HA/docker etc — those are project-specific).
postInstall: 1. Run DB migration to create user_widgets, widget_shares, user_widget_layout and user_dashboard_layout
2. lib/dashboardSections.ts exports DEFAULT_SECTIONS — replace with the keys your home page actually renders (it ships elite-hub's set as a placeholder)
3. Compose a HomeClient that renders <DashboardGrid layout={...} editing={editingMode} onLayoutChange={save}> with one child per section key
4. Provide an Edit toggle that flips `editing` — the CSS reveals the cyan corner/edge handles only while the root has .dashboard-editing
